security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:* http://localhost:*

bundle.longDescription: Twigo is a fast, keyboard-first desktop IDE for NATS. It imports your existing nats CLI contexts and gives you a subject explorer, live subscriptions, publish and request/reply, JetStream, KV and Object Store browsers, and a server monitoring overview.
